Class Tomato

java.lang.Object
entity.base.BaseItem
entity.base.BaseIngredient
entity.ingredients.Tomato
All Implemented Interfaces:
Choppable, Mixable
public class Tomato extends BaseIngredient implements Choppable, Mixable
Represents a tomato ingredient.

  • Method Details

    • chop

      public void chop()
      Set chopped state to true if chop conditions of that ingredient are met. Else, does nothing.
      Specified by:
      chop in interface Choppable

      isMixing in interface Mixable

      mixing boolean state of Mixable ingredient
